result.reasoning: From the tool call history: 1. Jessica Furniss's 2021 article (Step 2) shows the "best overall" ranking: Best Overall is Immaculate Baking Ready to Bake Cinnamon Rolls With Icing, and Runner-Up (position2) is Pillsbury Grands Cinnamon Rolls With Cream Cheese Icing. 2. Hannah Berman's 2023 article (Step 4) shows a full ranking list where position2 is Pillsbury Grands Cinnamon Rolls. 3. Comparing the same ranking position (#2) in both articles' "best overall" rankings, both feature products from the same company: Pillsbury. 4. Casing: The source text consistently capitalizes "Pillsbury" as a brand name, so authoritative casing is used.
